description: Identifies the scenario structure: A_BMP_VS_all_features (BMP per VS sensitivity), B_BMP_DM_no_DM_VS (BMP per DM without DM/VS), C_BMP_DM_all_features (primary BMP per DM Random Forest), D1_BMP_DM_no_DM (BMP per DM without DM), and D2_BMP_DM_no_VS (BMP per DM without VS). It also clarifies that nested-CV columns are out-of-fold validation predictions, whereas apparent full-data columns are fitted on all eligible rows and are not validation results.
